_comment: slack-reactor app, Socket Mode + bot events. Add this to the existing 'mukuls_bot' app (api.slack.com/apps → that app) rather than creating a new one, so its bot token stays the one in $SLACK_BOT_TOKEN. Socket Mode delivers BOT events, so the bot only receives reaction_added / app_mention / message events in channels (or DMs) it has been /invite-d to. Per-machine routing is by $TODO_EMOJI (and/or one app per machine). M5 wave-2: app_mention + message.* events feed the read-only bin/connectors/slack-events.py connector (spooled to ~/.assistant/connectors/slack/spool/); the reactor still never sends a message.

display_information.name: mukuls_bot
display_information.description: React an emoji on a thread to capture it as a /todo
